subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at Unity Feast in West Englewood, 1912-06-29
subcodes.first_line: This is a delightful gathering; you have come here with sincere intentions, and the purpose
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
